display_name: Error DJ - Meme Sound Effects for Code Errors

medium_findings.code_snippet: this.panel = vscode.window.createWebviewPanel('errorDjAudio', 'Error DJ', { viewColumn: vscode.ViewColumn.Beside, preserveFocus: true }, { enableScripts: true, retainContextWhenHidden: true });
